quest.Name: Crossed Threads
quest.Accomplishment: You ascertained the fate of a dragon-hunting snapjaw and returned to tell Crowsong what happened.
quest.Hagiograph: At Crowsong's request, =name= politely ascertained the fate of the dragon-hunter Rofwufufuf.
quest.Gospel: In the village of Kyakukya, =name= married the ivy-backed outcast, Crowsong, cementing an era of peaceful relations with the shapeshifting creatures of Qud.

step.Name: Travel to Azhdahak's den
step.text: Journey to the den of the dragon Azhdahak.

step.Name: Return to Crowsong
step.text: Tell Crowsong what became of Rofwufufuf.

quest.Name: Sparks on the Kindling
quest.Accomplishment: You reunited Rofwufufuf and Azhdahak, the exiles of the mountains.
quest.Hagiograph: In an act of brazen compassion, =name= brought Rofwufufuf to Azhdahak, bringing warmth to their once-solitary lives.
quest.Gospel: =name= officiated the wedding of the two pariahs, Rofwrufuf and Azhdahak. The lover's pact and =name='s holy touch would bring on a golden age of peace between Qud's scaled and snouted denizens.
